programmes.show_description: This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Mum's Present. Tish, Bobby and Dad go out shopping for Mum's birthday presents, but with little time left before they have to go home, they each try to find the perfect present.
Potato. Children's animation. Bing and Sula find a potato in Amma's vegetable patch with a comical face, so they take it under their wing, naming it Nosey.
Noise. Preschool series. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po are trying very hard not to make any noise. Then they make as much noise as possible during the Tubby Phone Dance.
Saving Action Ape. Tee plays a little too rough with his Action Ape toy causing it to lose its stuffing.
Tin Can Games. It's the Tin Can Games, and Evil Pea wants to win the Tin Can trophy. She cheats in the final race by putting a magnet on Supertato's back to stop him from going super fast.
Skipping. Coco is teaching Bing and Sula how to skip. Sula starts to get quite good at it, but Bing finds it difficult and gets frustrated. Can Coco and Sula help Bing learn to skip?
Watch the Birdie. Preston's stuck in a balloon, and only Mojo and Bo can get him back on the ground.
Ladybird's Game Show. Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.
The Comic Badge. Duggee is reading the Squirrels one of his favourite comics. They are eager to know the ending, but the comic was discontinued!
The Decider. The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game!
Rug Island. Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make Rug Island his home.
Go Jet Academy: Whale Rescue. When a pod of pilot whales becomes stranded on the Academy beach, the Go Jetters, Ubercorn and Tala need expert help from a new teacher to save the animals.
The Tale of the Amazing Mum. Mr Tod and Sammy Whiskers team up to strike the rabbits' big picnic.
Billabong Mystery. Tracker and Koshi's bird-studying mission is upended when a mysterious egg appears.
Four. The animated adventures of friends who can always count on each other. Four is the new block on the block and he can't wait to share how much he loves to be square.
Pen. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. P, E and N take on a pesky pen, who can draw anything it wants to escape them.
Treasure Hunt Day. Love Monster organises a treasure hunt for his friends, but he is worried that his homemade cookies aren't a special enough treasure.
Star. Bella and Lift are visited by a shining star and set off to explore the floors of Playtime Towers. The first stop is Sketch in Boxtropolis - what will she be making today?
Fig. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the nicest, kindest Fig, performing his song Just Can't Help Being Sweet!
Names. Pando has an earworm, and Bing isn't impressed.
Snail. Dee encourages a friend to say 'snail', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see a brown snail, a slimy-trail snail, a tiny snail and even meet a super snail.
Horsefly Jumps. Lu struggles to understand why Elodie is upset when she accidentally spoils her game.
Egg Race. Kitty wants to bounce like Sasha, so the Piggies create an egg-shaped vehicle for her. But Wilf makes it go wild and it's now a chase to stop it!
More About Wrapping. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos watch a nurse wrapping bandages around a man's leg and decide to try some wrapping too.
Splish Splash Splosh. Justin and his friends visit a water park, and Mr Tumble dances in the rain.
Running Race. Preschool comedy and education. The Teletubbies do running races and they each have a chance to win. In Tummy Tales, two sisters watch their dad running in a race.
Weather. Nigel and Baby Bear encourage grown-ups and their babies to explore weather-themed toys and objects, through discovery, play, song and story time. Everyone at home can join in too.
Garden Centre. Elsee plays I-spy in a garden centre with her new friend Karlie.
Waking Up. Aaron, Novah and Joda go on a springtime adventure, meeting a beatboxing daffodil to find out why all the plants are starting to wake up.
Special Day. It's a special day in the attic. There's a yogurt pot bee, some snappy-mouthed plate animals and a cardboard box cake.
Mammoth Problem. Ginger and the Peas help a furry friend learn a new skill.
Doctors. Honey is stuck waiting for Dr Bingo as the other, more exciting injuries get seen before her. Receptionist Bluey tells her to be patient, some of these cases are a real pickle!
The Buddy Badge. Duggee hosts a Buddy Bonanza for Mrs Weaver and the Squirrels, with the aim of finding new buddies with common interests to them.

programmes.show_name: Hey Duggee: Top of the Pups
programmes.show_description: Incy Wincy Spider. Hedgley sings a song about Incy Wincy Spider.
Golden Chicken and Lamp Post Walk. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers spot a golden chicken and cheer up a lamp post on a walk to pick vegetables!
Ted Goes Wild. Ted visits a wildlife park and helps look after the animals. He feeds the deer, gets a close-up look at a bison's gigantic tongue, and has a chat with a very noisy otter!
Connor's Scottish Vegetarian Haggis. Connor makes a vegetarian haggis to share with his friends. He serves his haggis with neeps and tatties and has invited a bagpiper as a surprise.

programmes.show_name: Teeny Tiny Creatures with Chantelle and Rory
programmes.show_description: Puffins. Rory and Sandy search for puffins. Chantelle joins an amazing young bird watcher.
Mission: Bandage Team. Therapy dog Sylvie and her owner, Katrina, visit the doctor's to help a little boy called Ben feel brave enough to see Dr Stevens about his grazed knee.
Snow Leopard and Yak. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet two amazing animals and reveal a surprising connection between them in the wild. This time, it's a snow leopard and some yaks.
Waffle Make and Do. Doug helps Waffle make new neighbour Pepper a dog bed. They fondly remember when Mrs Hobbs adopted Pepper and when they made their first box-bed for her cat, George.
Spot the Puffin. Oona learns to love her colourful beak.
Yes Sir. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. In this swinging homage to the Sinatra era, the Small Potatoes sing about how they are no average spuds.
Earning Your Stripes. A samba band is coming to play, and everyone is helping to prepare. Stripes is so busy that he has forgotten one thing - to book the band!
The Future Badge. The Squirrels are transported into the future, where they encounter a robot version of Duggee as well as a few other interesting changes to the clubhouse.
Bee. Dee encourages a friend to say 'bee', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of different bees. There are stripy bees, buzzy bees, and yellow, black and fuzzy bees.
Capacity for Magic. Nine and friends learn that the amount of stuff that fits inside any container, tall or wide, is called capacity.
Mine. Educational fun. Alphablock I is having a dance party - by herself! Can her friends help her see the light on disco night?
Flying Fun. Justin and his friends meet some very cool, feathered friends and learn to fly them. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble is taking a trip on an aeroplane... but who is the pilot?
Twinkle Twinkle. Preschool fun from Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies are all sleeping - apart from Tinky Winky. Tinky Winky sees a star in the sky which sings Twinkle Twinkle.
Patchwork Rabbit. Patchwork Rabbit has a problem: he's invited everyone to his big circus, but they don't think it's big at all! Can Patchwork Rabbit save the show?
Boing Boing. Stop-frame animation featuring Raa Raa, who lives in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. Raa Raa has got a new pogo stick and has a great time bouncing around.
Action Chugger's Day Off. Action Chugger has a hard time relaxing.
Episode 23. Comedy sketch show for younger viewers. Rapids Johnson enjoys an ice cream on his search for the Ice Cream Bear and Storybook Stan is distracted by some chewy toffees.
Sabre-Toothed Cat and Roar. Preschool series. Andy travels back in time to visit the sabre-toothed cat, but when his clock malfunctions, he is shrunk down to the size of an insect!
Where Is My Home? The Game Catchers arrive on the Underwater Planet and play follow the clue. They are interrupted by a lost turtle, who can't seem to find her way home.
Loggerhead Sea Turtle. Animated deep sea adventure series. When an underwater tremor separates the Gup-X and its crew, Barnacles seeks guidance from a mysterious sea turtle.
The Tale of the Stolen Firewood. Animated series. When Peter, Lily and Benjamin go out to collect firewood, they soon find that not one but three predators are after some too.
The Philosophy Badge. The Squirrels think about life's big questions, helping Tino the Artistic Mouse escape a crisis of confidence and gaining their Philosophy Badges in the process.
Kipp's Dizzy Mystery. When Kipp doesn't know what made him giddy, it's up to Vida to solve the dizzy mystery.
Fortune Cookies. Evil Pea tricks Supertato and Broccoli with fake fortune cookies that tell them to leave the supermarket. Thankfully, Carrot doesn't believe them and saves the day.
Mission Harmony. Weasy and Spicy have to cover their ears when Sunny learns to play the guitar.
Breakdown Bryan. Bryan the ferry can't shut his engine off, so he's speeding out of control around the lake. How will Mojo and Bo get aboard to take control and steer Bryan to safety?
The Decider. The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game!
The Fishy Treasure Hunt. The Piris join a treasure hunt competition, but is Captain Krill all that he appears?
Rug Island. Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make Rug Island his home.
Andy and the Baby Triceratops. Andy discovers a lost baby triceratops with a thorn in its foot that needs his help.
Waffle is a Listening Dog. Waffle tries to impress on his first day as a listening dog at school. Mrs Hobbs arrives to collect Waffle, but her cat, George, goes missing.
The Mermaid Wish. Rafi's mermaid wish helps Jake find his courage, and they have a fun underwater tea party.
It's Time to Bake. Gran Gran and JoJo are excited to bake a batch of Great Gran Gran's signature Saint Lucian banana bread, but there's a problem - they don't know how long to bake it for!
Haircut. Animation for preschool children. Sarah's hair keeps getting in her way, so it's time for a trip to the hairdresser.
Things. Stop-motion animation. Three pale things - a shell, a spiral and a cone - drift towards the planet seeking music, heat and light to revive them.
Den. MeMo's den is not big enough for two. BaBa wants to build one they can both enjoy, so MeMo shows BaBa how. They build a den for the Yummies that's just right.
Looking for Each Other. Children's animation. Igglepiggle and Upsy Daisy are best friends, but Igglepiggle can't find Upsy Daisy, so he looks everywhere and asks everyone.
Sara Cox - Kitsy Bitsy's Noisy Neighbours. Make some noise with BBC Radio 2 DJ Sara Cox in this Bedtime Story.
This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Stone Age Barbecue. Pola has forgotten to buy the meat for the family barbecue. To avoid the barbecue being postponed, Tish proposes they hunt for vegetables instead.
Wellies. Children's animation. Bing discovers a hole in his favourite yellow wellies, but he does not want to throw them away. With Flop's help, Bing finds a way to recycle them.
Footprints. Preschool comedy and education. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa follow a trail of muddy footprints and find Po in bed with very muddy feet. The Noo-noo cleans up.
Remote. Tee wants to watch his favourite TV show, Bubble Duck, but Mo is already watching hers.
Tablet Takeover. The Veggies are delighted with a new tablet they've found. When they're not looking, Evil Pea turns the tablet to evil mode. Soon the tablet takes over the supermarket.
Fossil. Sula finds a beautiful fossil in the Howly Woods, so Bing wants to find one too.
Pirate Parade. Mojo and Bo fix Ted up as a pirate ship for the Pirate Parade, but swashbuckling Cap'n Dot hijacks him! Team Mojo must out-pirate Dot and sail the streets to stop her.
Campfire Choir. Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!
The Senses Badge. Roly has lost his best potato, but Duggee finds it using his sense of smell.
Cubby. Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy, Kimjim.
Charades. The Heeler cousins play charades and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.
Chinese New Year, Dragon Dance Drama. Glitch's fire-breathing, dancing dragon robot goes out of control on Beijing's streets.
The Tale of Mum's Precious Things. Animated series. When Peter accidentally discards his mother's most precious possessions, he must retrieve them from Tommy Brock!
Spider Crab Surprise. The Octonauts identify a mysterious creature that turns out to be a spider crab in need.
Five. The animated adventures of friends who can always count on each other. Five arrives to get the band together, and the party started, with a big high five.
Up. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. U gets the balloon ride of his life, but he is still unhappy - or so he thinks!
Choose One Thing Day. Love Monster struggles to find the perfect epic birthday present for Bad Idea Puppy.
Cup. Bella plays with her favourite cup - it makes the perfect drum for a sing along with Lift. Together, they visit Kingsley and Queenie who play the 'Tea Party Dash', but who will win?
Mango. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the magical wish granter Mango, ready to make all the cast wishes come true!
Camping. Sula and Bing go camping to see the night sky. But then Bing sees a scary shadow...
Robot. Dee encourages a friend to say 'robot', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see a silver robot, a zooming robot and even a rainbow robot.
When's My Turn? Lu has trouble waiting for her turn to play with a toy.
Drum Drama. The Drums Festival approaches, but everyone's drums keep vanishing. The Piggies hide inside a huge drum to try to discover what's going on.
More About Hiding. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos are hiding behind some suitcases. As a porter takes the cases away, the Twirlywoos must find a new place to hide.
Treasure Hunt. Justin and his friends go on a treasure hunt, and Mr Tumble's cake goes on an adventure!
Fixing Things. Preschool series. The Teletubbies go on a Tubby Custard Ride and make a lovely custardy mess inside and outside Home Dome.
Mealtime. Giovanna, Baby Bear and everyone at The Baby Club explore mealtime-themed objects and toys through discovery, play, song and a story. Grown-ups and babies at home can join in too!
Urban Park. Elsee meets her new friend Jacob in the city and plays a game of I-spy.
Minibeasts. Aaron, Nelly and Adrian are on an adventure, looking for bugs in the city centre oasis, whilst finding out how minibeasts help the garden grow.
Cowgirl Rebecca. Rebecca really wants to win a lasso contest. Before that, she helps Murphi make a toothpaste tube snake and a terrific tube vulture. Will she lasso first place?
Smell You Later. Ginger and the Peas meet the stinky Onion-Rexes who help stop the nasty Bananaraptors.
The Claw. When Bluey and Bingo are unable to grab a prize on a magic claw machine, Mum and Dad create their own version at home. But Dad isn't about to make winning easy.
The Bridge Badge. It's bridge building time! The Squirrels help a quarreling group of Gerbils sort out their longstanding disagreement.

programmes.show_name: Hey Duggee: Top of the Pups
programmes.show_description: Five Speckled Frogs. We sing a calming song about counting frogs with Mrs Weaver.
Magical Door and Stompy Bridge Walk. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers cross a stompy bridge and dance like elves on a walk to plant seeds.
King Henry. Henry pretends to be a king and heads on an adventurous quest to rescue a treasured toy!
Je'nae's Jamaican Saltfish and Cabbage. Je'nae is cooking her favourite meal of Jamaican saltfish and cabbage. Her mum has cooked some Jamaican dumplings and rice to eat with it.

programmes.show_name: Teeny Tiny Creatures with Chantelle and Rory
programmes.show_description: Barnacles. Chantelle meets new some friends to look for barnacles, while Rory meets a marine expert.
Mission: New Sound. Hearing dog Diesel is helping his teenage owner, Rayane, with his Sunday chores when he hears a new sound he has never heard before. What could it be?
Elephant and Lemur. Steve and Aneeshwar meet some Asian elephants and give them a shower with a giant hose. They also meet some lemurs and discover their wild connection with the elephants.
Meeting Waffle. Preschool comedy drama series. A newlywed family discover a lost puppy hiding among their wedding presents. Daughter Evie wants to keep him and call him Waffle.
The Sad Whale. Oona and Silky help a whale find its family.
Potato Love. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. In this reggae song the Small Potatoes sing about how wonderful it is to be alive and feel the Potato Love.
Slow Down TapTap. TapTap's loud, fast drumming is driving everyone in the garden to distraction.
The Sharing Badge. Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and learn how to share by dividing things equally.
Moon. Dee encourages a friend to say 'moon', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Before we say good night to the moon, we see a bright moon, a light moon and even a tickly moon!
How Many Smoothies? Five's new smoothie café is open! Can the Numberblocks get the orders right?
Home. Educational fun. O has the most extraordinary day ever, with a goat on a boat, a mole in a hole and a magic golden discovery.
Fairy Tale. Justin and his friends visit a fairy-tale castle, and Mr Tumble has a fairy-tale adventure.
Again Again. Preschool fun from Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies can't get enough of the Tubby Custard Ride so they ask to go on it again and again!
Patchwork Hummingbird. Patchwork Hummingbird has a problem: he wants to drink sweet nectar but the flowers are closed! Will the Patchwork Pals find a way to help him?
Catch Me If You Can. Animation featuring Raa Raa, who lives in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. All the animals are having a nap. But Raa Raa and Ooo Ooo are not tired and want to play.
Twin Trouble. Hoot and Toot have had enough! The twins' bickering has finally led them to separate and go different ways.
Episode 24. Comedy sketch show for younger viewers. Gail Force reports live from a new playground and is very keen to try out all the new equipment.
Centrosaurus and Video. Preschool adventure series. Andy searches a prehistoric forest for a plant-munching dinosaur, but he runs into a relative of the T-rex instead.
The Musical Cow. The Game Catchers land on a cartoon-like planet to play hit the can.
Octonauts and the Poison Dart Frogs. Animated deep sea adventure series. The Octonauts must avoid the poison dart frogs who live in trees above the Amazon river.
The Tale of Jeremy Fisher's Recital. Animated series. When Sammy Whiskers and Mr Tod crash Jeremy Fisher's annual lakeside get-together, it is up to Peter to save the party.
The History Badge. The Squirrels get a special history lesson from Duggee and some faces from the past.
Vida's Healthy Fur Day. Zigzag avoids Vida's Healthy Fur Day because she's afraid to brush the knots out.
Young Veggies: Part 1. Evil Pea tells the story of how she and Supertato first met as young veggies.
Mission Puppet. The ducklings discover a device that allows them to control Weasy's movements. Things go awry when it ends up in the hands of the cheeky Chipmunk!
The Sticky Sauce Situation. Fabio's yummy new sauce is so sticky that he gets stuck to Mojo's bonnet. They have to do everything together until Bo figures out how to 'unsticky' that sauce!
Cubby. Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy, Kimjim.
Coconut Island. When the berg hits a desert island, the Piris' behaviour makes the local monkeys angry.
Charades. The Heeler cousins play charades and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.
Andy and the Dino Tree Mystery. Andy discovers unusual markings on some trees and tracks down the dinosaur culprit.
Waffle the Pupil. On Waffle's first day as a trial school pupil, he struggles to hold a pen. Waffle decides to hide Miss Berrington's pen pot. If he can't write, why should anyone else?
The Baby Wish. Rafi's wish turns her dads into babies. She realises being a grown-up means having responsibility - and that chores can be fun when mixed with dancing.
It's Time to Visit the Farm. JoJo looks forward to visiting Melanie the chick at the city farm, but where could she be?
Constable Quack. Animation for preschool children. After their snacks go missing, Sergeant Sarah and Constable Quack are on the trail of a biscuit burglar.
Round and Round. Animation about a family of small creatures who live on, and inside, a planet. Mother Clanger closes her garden to visitors to get a bit of peace.
Mirror. MeMo and BaBa have fun looking at their reflections in a puddle and a toy mirror. The latter proves very useful after a messy meal of spaghetti with the Yummies.
High and Low. In a magical forest, characters have adventures. The Tombliboos explore inside their house and go right to the top. Down below, Makka Pakka waits to wash their faces.
Steve Carell - Eyebrows of Doom. Join Steve Carell for the hilarious tale of a pair of mischievous eyebrows with minds of their own.
